title: PPIP - Dialog after Onboarding - UI
scenario: PPIP data sharing dialog appears after onboarding when tapping "Continue as Guest" on Poly Studio Mobile app
steps: 1. Launch the Poly Studio Mobile app.
3. On the final onboarding screen, tap "Continue as Guest".
expected: A PPIP (Product and Personal Improvement Program) dialog is displayed with the title/header text "Help us improve your experience." and two buttons: "Don't Share" and "Share Data". The dialog body explains that HP may collect basic device and app information (model, serial number, software version, feature usage) to improve performance and support, notes that no personal information is collected, and states that preferences can be changed later in Settings.
